projectDescription: A Gulp-based front-end build starter for automating Shopify theme development — compiling SCSS/Sass, minifying CSS and JavaScript, optimizing images, and live-reloading with BrowserSync.
keyFeatures: Automatic Sass/SCSS compilation to CSS with Bourbon and Bourbon Neat support
CSS autoprefixing and minification via PostCSS and gulp-clean-css
JavaScript/TypeScript transpilation with Babel and uglification
Image optimization (JPEG, PNG, GIF, SVG) via gulp-imagemin
Live browser reloading with BrowserSync during development
Sass and JavaScript linting via Stylelint and ESLint
Husky pre-commit hooks with lint-staged for SCSS linting
Unit testing with Vitest and jsdom
Source map generation for CSS and JavaScript
publicApiSurface: gulp serve — start BrowserSync dev server
gulp watch — watch all src files and recompile on change
gulp build — full production build (parallel tasks)
gulp cleanAssets — delete compiled assets and src/css
gulp sass — compile root SCSS files
gulp sassComponents — compile component SCSS with component- prefix
gulp sassSections — compile section SCSS with section- prefix
gulp minifyCss — minify compiled CSS to assets/
gulp lintScss — lint SCSS files via sass-lint
gulp js — compile and minify root TypeScript files
gulp jsComponents — compile component TypeScript with component- prefix
gulp jsSections — compile section TypeScript with section- prefix
gulp lintJs — lint TypeScript files via ESLint
gulp fonts — copy fonts to assets/
gulp images — optimise images to assets/
yarn start — alias for gulp watch
yarn serve — alias for gulp serve
yarn build — alias for gulp build
yarn test — run Vitest test suite
yarn lint — run ESLint on src/**/*.ts
yarn format — run Prettier on all files
yarn reset — clean node_modules, build, css, and assets
